_comment_top: SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0 WITH LLVM-exception. JSON has no comment syntax; the SPDX header rides on this top-level key per specs/009-t1-textmate-grammar/research.md §2 (precedent: .github/branch-protection.json). T1 contributed: language ID + TextMate grammar; folder-drop install only (no Marketplace metadata). T8 amendments (specs/010-t8-tree-sitter-grammar/contracts/vscode-extension.contract.md §1): bumped engines.vscode to ^1.84.0 (DocumentSemanticTokensProvider stability floor), added `main` pointing at the compiled extension entry, added activationEvents `onLanguage:nsl`, added contributes.semanticTokenTypes (21 entries — the 20 required-minimum captures from data-model.md §1.4 PLUS the FR-009 control-terminal capture `variable.builtin.terminal` per highlights-coverage.contract.md §2), added contributes.semanticTokenScopes mapping each tokenType to a TextMate-style scope name array for theme fallback, added dependencies.web-tree-sitter pinned ABI-compatible with tree-sitter-cli@0.22.x (research.md §1/§7), and added scripts.compile invoking tsc with editors/vscode/treesitter/tsconfig.json. The semanticTokenScopes fallbacks deliberately route T1-already-handled categories (keywords, types, numbers, strings, comments) to T1's own scopes so a theme without semantic-token rules sees no T8 regression on the T1 surface; only the identifier sub-captures (#13–#21) introduce new fallback scopes that T1 left un-scoped — that is the whole T8 value-prop.
name: nsl
description: Syntax highlighting and editor configuration for NSL (Next Synthesis Language). T1 deliverable; LSP / lint / format land at T3+. T8 adds tree-sitter-driven semantic tokens for register/wire/memory/proc/func/state identifier classification.

semanticTokenTypes.description: NSL storage-class keywords used as types (reg/wire/mem/integer/variable)
Generic control-call (fallback when proc/func sub-resolution fails)
Definition site of a `proc <name> { ... }` (function.proc, FR-007 sub-capture)
Definition site of a `func <name> { ... }` (function.func, FR-007 sub-capture)
State-definition name and goto target resolved to a state_name (S11/S25)
Control-terminal name in expression position (FR-009 / S27 constructive)
